title: PR 115 watcher handoff started; remote cadence slowed
body: Hearthlit PR 115 watcher handoff started at .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-hearthlit-pr-115-watch-handoff.md. Per owner direction, remote GitHub polling is now throttled to one check per five minutes; next conservative remote poll no earlier than 2026-05-25T14:46:44Z unless owner asks for an immediate refresh. No source claim opened; no remote PR poll performed for this handoff write.
